title: Smoothly Optimized
description: A lightweight PvP-focused optimization modpack designed to boost FPS, reduce lag, and deliver smooth performance on lower-end PCs.
body:
# ⚡ Smoothly Optimized 4.0
## DISCONTINUED

**Maximum FPS.** **Pure PvP Performance.** **Built for 1.21 & 1.21.4.**

Smoothly Optimized (SmoothOpt) is a **lightweight PvP and performance-focused modpack** designed to deliver smooth, stable, and highly responsive gameplay — even on **low-end PCs.**

Version 4.0 is fully refined for competitive players. It includes only **essential FPS optimization mods** and **useful PvP utilities.** No unnecessary features. No visual clutter. No performance-heavy extras. Every mod has been carefully selected and tested for stability, compatibility, and maximum efficiency in competitive environments.

# 🚀 Features

- Significantly improved and stable FPS
  
- Reduced frame drops and micro-stutters
  
- Lower input latency for faster reactions
  
- Clean, distraction-free interface
  
- Lightweight and optimized setup
  
# ⚠️ Known Issue – Lunar Client

**There is currently a visual hotbar glitch when using Lunar Client where it may disappear and reappear. A fix is being researched. For now, Lunar Client is not recommended.**

# 📦 Client Compatibility

For best compatibility, use: **Modrinth Launcher**

# 📌 Extra Info

Some PvP resource packs are included. A few are made by me (such as PaleOverlayV3 and PaleOverlayV4), while others are created by different pack makers.

**If needed, you can convert the .mrpack file here:**
https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/@master/
